name: CognitiveTPG
message: CognitiveTPG specializes in innovative printing solutions, offering a range of products including label printers, POS printers, and security print solutions. Their intended clients span various industries such as retail, healthcare, banking, hospitality, and manufacturing.We will upload corporate data soon. Passports numbers, DLs, SSNs,addresses, phones and other personal information of employees, partners files, specifications, projects info, NDAs, etc.
